helpOutput:
Usage: opencli hackernews ask [options]

[read] Hacker News Ask HN posts

Options:
  --limit [value]     Number of stories (default: "20")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  --trace <mode>      Trace capture: off, on, retain-on-failure (default: "off")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Access: read | Browser: no | Domain: news.ycombinator.com
Example: opencli hackernews ask -f yaml
Output columns: rank, id, title, score, author, comments, url

taskKey: hackernews-default:hackernews search ask hn mcp --limit 5 -f json
helpOutput:
Usage: opencli hackernews search [options] <query>

[read] Search Hacker News stories

Arguments:
  query               Search query

Options:
  --limit [value]     Number of results (default: "20")
  --sort [value]      Sort by relevance or date (default: "relevance")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  --trace <mode>      Trace capture: off, on, retain-on-failure (default: "off")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

  --sort: relevance, date  (default: relevance)
Access: read | Browser: no | Domain: news.ycombinator.com
Example: opencli hackernews search <query> -f yaml
Output columns: rank, id, title, score, author, comments, url
